overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an action RPG showing an armored warrior traversing a snowy mountain temple environment. The character walks through narrow canyons lined with giant stone statues, crosses wooden bridges, and approaches a massive gate entrance while snow falls continuously.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with giant stone statues and wooden walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden bridge through the narrow canyon flanked by stone statues

entered.detail: massive carved stone figures lining both sides of the narrow passage
snow-dusted wooden planks forming the path through the canyon
thick iron chains suspended across the gap above the walkway
tall rock walls covered in snow forming the canyon sides

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain canyon on a wooden bridge, flanked by massive stone statues and snow-covered cliffs. Iron chains hang overhead as snow falls gently through the partial opening above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain clearing with shrine

events.description: exits narrow canyon onto open snowy plateau with visible sky

agents.ego_description: walking through deep snow toward a glowing red shrine in the open mountain clearing

entered.detail: small shrine structure emitting red light and smoke from a burning brazier
leafless trees covered in snow scattered across the landscape
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow canyon, the scene opens into a wide snowy clearing under bright sky. A red-glowing shrine sits to the left while snow-covered trees and distant mountain peaks fill the background. The character trudges through deep snow away from the canyon entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain valley with ancient ruins

events.description: terrain becomes more rocky with scattered stone ruins and broken structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain and stone ruins toward a distant structure

entered.detail: ancient crumbling stone walls and foundations covered in snow
collapsed wooden scaffolding and beams from old construction
snow-covered stone steps leading upward through the ruins

segments.scene_description: The path leads through a rocky valley filled with ancient stone ruins and broken wooden structures. The character ascends stone stairs winding through the debris, with the red shrine now behind and the terrain becoming more enclosed by rock walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple gate entrance with lit braziers

events.description: approaching massive wooden gate structure with burning braziers
entering shadow of the gate structure, fire light becomes more prominent

agents.ego_description: ascending the final stone steps toward the dark temple entrance

entered.detail: massive dark wooden gate with thick pillars and hanging ropes
burning fire pits flanking the entrance steps
thick stone columns supporting the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive temple gate flanked by burning braziers and stone pillars. As they ascend the final steps, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with the firelight illuminating the snow-dusted stone entrance to the temple interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic mountain canyon into a wide snowy expanse before concluding at a monumental temple entrance. It begins with the character crossing a wooden bridge flanked by massive stone statues and hanging iron chains under a narrow strip of snowy sky. As the character emerges from the canyon, the scene opens into a bright, wide clearing featuring a red-glowing shrine and distant mountain peaks. The path then shifts into a rocky valley of ancient ruins and broken structures, where the camera follows the character ascending winding stone stairs as the terrain becomes increasingly enclosed. Finally, the environment darkens as the character approaches a massive temple gate, where burning braziers illuminate the snow-dusted stone pillars and the entrance to the interior.
